channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Tools & Frameworks
channel.description: Latest Tools & Frameworks news in Context Engineering

item.title: Confidence Estimation in Automatic Short Answer Grading with LLMs
item.description: arXiv:2605.00200v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Automatic Short Answer Grading (ASAG) with generative large language models (LLMs) has recently demonstrated strong performance without task-specific fine-tuning, while also enabling the generation of synthetic feedback for educational assessment. Des...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> framework, fine-tuning, LLM, model, arxiv | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: awesome-prompt-engineering - A curated list of resources, tools, papers, and platforms for prompt engineering in large language models (LLMs) and generative AI.
item.description: A curated list of resources, tools, papers, and platforms for prompt engineering in large language models (LLMs) and generative AI.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> prompt engineering, prompt, LLM, tool, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: fastapi_mcp - Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!
item.description: Expose your FastAPI endpoints as Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, with Auth!<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> context, API, tool, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>

item.title: Persona-Grounded Safety Evaluation of AI Companions in Multi-Turn Conversations
item.description: arXiv:2605.00227v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: There are growing concerns about the risks posed by AI companion applications designed for emotional engagement. Existing safety evaluations often rely on self-reported user data or interviews, offering limited insights into real-time dynamics. We pre...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> model, arxiv, LLM, framework | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: CRADIPOR: Crash Dispersion Predictor
item.description: arXiv:2605.00070v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present CRADIPOR, a numerical dispersion prediction tool for automotive crash simulations. Finite Element (FE) crash models are widely used throughout vehicle development, but their predictions are not strictly repeatable because of parallel comput...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> ICL, analysis, framework, tool, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 40%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)
